description: This file represents the expected JSON structure from the WordPress REST API for each Custom Post Type (CPT). Use this as a reference for configuring JetEngine REST API endpoints with bilingual ACF fields.

title.rendered: The Philosophy of Khao Yai Art Forest

content.rendered: Khao Yai Art Forest represents a unique approach to contemporary art presentation, where artworks are not confined to white cube galleries but integrated into the natural landscape. This philosophy reflects a deep respect for both artistic expression and environmental context.

acf.title_th: ปรัชญาของเขาใหญ่อาร์ตฟอเรสต์
acf.summary_en: Exploring the unique philosophy behind integrating contemporary art with natural landscape.
acf.summary_th: สำรวจปรัชญาพิเศษในการผสานศิลปะร่วมสมัยกับภูมิทัศน์ธรรมชาติ
acf.author_en: Khao Yai Art Forest Editorial Team
acf.author_th: ทีมบรรณาธิการเขาใหญ่อาร์ตฟอเรสต์
categories_th: ศิลปะร่วมสมัย

notes.bilingual_structure: All content uses separate ACF fields for Thai (_th) and English (_en) to maintain proper bilingual support
acf_fields: artist_en, artist_th: Artist name in both languages
curator_en, curator_th: Curator name(s) in both languages
date_display_en, date_display_th: Display date in both languages
categories_en, categories_th: Array of category strings
listing_summary_en, listing_summary_th: Short summary for listing pages
tags_en, tags_th: Array of tag strings for search/filtering
specifications_en, specifications_th: Object with key-value pairs for technical details
notes.wordpress_setup: Configure JetEngine or ACF to create these custom fields for each CPT. Ensure REST API access is enabled.
notes.embedding: Use _embed parameter in WordPress REST API to include featured media and taxonomy terms in response
